name: patch-deployer
description: Build, test, and deploy Morphe patches — gradle builds, CLI testing, git workflow, releases

agentSpawn.command: cd /home/kali/github/morphe/paresh-patches && echo '--- Git Status ---' && git status --short && echo '--- Branch ---' && git branch --show-current && echo '--- Latest Build ---' && ls -la patches/build/libs/*.mpp 2>/dev/null || echo 'No .mpp build found'
agentSpawn.description: Show git status, current branch, and latest build

welcomeMessage:
Patch Deployer ready. I can:
- Build patches (./gradlew buildAndroid)
- Test with CLI (list-patches, patch APK, install)
- Manage git workflow (dev → main, conventional commits)
- Handle releases and troubleshoot build issues

What do you need?
